_comment: Single source of truth for the Telegram bot menu. telegram-menu.js builds setMyCommands from this; the review-buttons plugin reads it to register the menu on every gateway boot AND to dispatch each command; smoke-test.js asserts every command here has a reachable handler (no 'registered but not wired'). Handler types: 'render' = run cli+args and send the JSON payload; 'prompt' = send a ForceReply and capture the reply (probe is the read-only reachability check the smoke test runs).

commands.desc: 📋 Review queue — work through pending cards

handler.prompt:
➕ Reply with the new client's name and address, e.g.
`Jane Doe, 123 Main St, Stuart FL`

commands.desc: 🔍 Status — queue depth, tasks, last ingest
🔭 Observation log — what the agent has noticed
